title: MonetDB doesn't handle ANY/SOME/ALL operator correctly
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (f1 INTEGER, f2 TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2 (f1 INTEGER, f2 INTEGER DEFAULT 0, f3 REAL);
INSERT INTO t2 (f1, f2, f3) VALUES (1, 10, 1.5), (2, NULL, 2.5), (3, 20, NULL);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE f1 > (SELECT MAX(f2) FROM t2 WHERE f2 IS NOT NULL);
